response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (including MCP code generators). Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE), polyglot background covering Java, and hands-on experience with MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes align tightly with the stack. Minor gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but the foundation makes ramp-up trivial.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB at Optilyz
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq matches the AI agent requirement
Proven craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, plus teaching/workshop track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older (robotic arms era)
No explicit cloud breadth beyond AWS CDK; GCP/Azure not referenced
